title: Find My Device - Playing sound from 2 different devices
scenario: "Find My Device" tone fails with error popup on second headset when two headsets are simultaneously paired and connected
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Pair and connect Headset A to the app.
Pair and connect Headset B to the app (both headsets should be simultaneously connected).
Navigate to Home → [Headset A] → Notifications → Find My Device.
Tap 'Play Tone' on Headset A and confirm the tone plays successfully.
Return to Home → [Headset B] → Notifications → Find My Device.
expected: The 'Find My Device' tone should play on Headset B without any errors.
